# Graffiti CSS Framework

> A minimal, drop-in CSS toolkit with fluid typography, modern CSS features, and zero JavaScript dependencies.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @drop-in/graffiti
```

### Import Options

```js
// Full framework (~75KB)
import '@drop-in/graffiti'

// Minimal - core + utilities only (~26KB)
import '@drop-in/graffiti/minimal'

// Standard - core + utilities + layouts (~33KB)
import '@drop-in/graffiti/standard'
```

## Philosophy

Graffiti styles native HTML elements directly - no component library, no JavaScript framework required. It uses modern CSS features like OKLCH colors, container queries, CSS scroll-snap, and the popover/dialog APIs.

**Key principles:**
- **Native HTML first** - Use `<dialog>`, `<details>`, `popover`, HTML invokers before reaching for JS
- **Minimal classes** - Most elements are styled automatically, add classes only when needed
- **CSS custom properties** - Customize colors, spacing, and sizing via variables
- **Fluid typography** - Text scales smoothly between viewport sizes
- **Automatic theming** - Light/dark mode via `light-dark()` with no extra work

## Documentation

Full documentation is served via content negotiation. Request any route with `Accept: text/markdown` header to get agent-optimized markdown.

### Routes

- [Base](https://graffiti-ui.com/base) - Typography, variables, colors, form defaults
- [Utilities](https://graffiti-ui.com/utilities) - Layouts, stack/cluster, handy utilities
- [Elements](https://graffiti-ui.com/elements) - Buttons, cards, chips, tags, avatars, dialogs
- [UI Blocks](https://graffiti-ui.com/ui-blocks) - Accordion, sidebar nav, mobile patterns, forms

### Example: Get Elements Documentation

```bash
curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://graffiti-ui.com/elements
```

---

## Quick Reference by Intent

### Navigation
- `.sidebar-nav` - Collapsible app sidebar with sections
- `.dropdown` + `popover` - Popover-based menu (no JS)
- `.header` - Site header with nav links
- `.footer` - Site footer with nav columns
- `.breadcrumbs` - Hierarchy trail navigation
- `.pagination` - Page navigation controls
- `.list-nav` - Settings/menu rows with icons

### Layouts
- `.layout-sidebar` - Sidebar + main content
- `.layout-card` - Auto-fit card grid
- `.layout-split` - 50/50 split
- `.layout-readable` - Max-width content container
- `.stack` - Vertical flow with gap
- `.cluster` - Horizontal wrapping flow
- `.split` - Space-between alignment

### Mobile
- `.app-shell` - Grid-based app container (100dvh)
- `.bottom-nav` - Fixed bottom tab bar
- `.bottom-sheet` - Drawer from bottom
- `.safe-top`, `.safe-bottom` - iOS safe area padding

### Elements
- `button`, `.button` - Button styling and variants
- `.chip` - Selectable pills for filters
- `.tag` - Category and status labels
- `.avatar` - User images and initials
- `.card` - Structured content container
- `.callout` - Info/warning/error boxes
- `.tooltip` - Hover tooltips (CSS anchor positioning)
- `dialog` - Native modal with animations

### Forms
- Native inputs styled automatically
- `.toggle` - Switch input
- `.input-group` - Input + button combo
- `.search` - Search with icon
- `.dropzone` - File upload zone
- `.form-actions` - Submit/cancel row

### Reference
- `--primary`, `--success`, `--warning`, `--error` - Semantic colors
- `--pad-*`, `--vs-*` - Spacing tokens
- `--br-*` - Border radius tokens
- `--shadow-*` - Shadow tokens
- `.h1`-`.h6`, `.fs-*` - Typography utilities
